indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed takes up a significant portion of the floor space, leaving little room for a yoga mat.

indicators.name: bookshelf
indicators.rationale: The bookshelf along the wall obstructs the open floor space needed for yoga.

indicators.name: potted plant
indicators.rationale: The potted plant on the nightstand is too close to the bed, potentially obstructing the yoga mat.

indicators.name: book
indicators.rationale: The books on the nightstand are too close to the bed, potentially obstructing the yoga mat.

indicators.name: wall
indicators.rationale: The wall behind the bed is too close, limiting the open floor space needed for yoga.

indicators.name: lighting
indicators.rationale: The wall-mounted lamp provides ambient lighting suitable for a yoga session.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga due to the presence of a bed and other objects that obstruct the open floor space needed for yoga. The lighting is suitable for a yoga session, but the limited open floor area makes it difficult to set up a yoga mat.
